name: 5q31_1_SLC22A4_SLC22A5_cluster
description: 5q31.1 SLC22 organic-cation-transporter (OCT) cluster. SLC22A4 (OCTN1), SLC22A5 (OCTN2) and IRF1 sit in a tandem ~250 kb block with short intragenic SDs. The OCT paralog family is dispersed across chromosomes (SLC22A1/2/3 on 6q25, SLC22A6/8/11 on 11q12, OCTN-family at 5q31). Association with Crohn disease risk haplotype 'IBD5'.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem pair SLC22A4-SLC22A5 plus IRF1, P4HA2, PDLIM4; short intragenic SDs ~5 kb; cross-chromosome paralog tracts (5q31 <-> 6q25 SLC22A1/2/3; 11q12 SLC22A6/8/11) at 50-70% protein identity.
